title: Azura Client Essentials+
description: A deeply optimized modpack built around the Essential mod spiced up with handy everyday utility mods and features
body:
## This is a version of [Azura Client Essentials](https://modrinth.com/modpack/azura-client-essentials) with the [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) mod

**The Essential mod can be amazing for certain people, but for some, it's just not that essential. But for those who find themselves regularly using Essential, this is the perfect choice for you!**

And even if you rarely use the Essential mod, you could still try it out! It allows you to play with your friends with little to no effort! And who would say no to seeing Emotes and Cosmetics on a server, and even being able to use them yourself? So hear me out, You could test if Essential is your thing and play with it for a few weeks. And only then you choose if it's your thing. 

‎ 
## Additional features (On top of Client Necessities)
- 🎙️ Voice chat
- 📹 Replay Mod
- 🪄 OptiFine features
- 🌍 Host worlds to friends
- 🔧 Various QoL improvements and fixes
- 🏞️ Unlimited render distance on servers
- 📔 Browse resourcepacks and shaders ingame
- 🖥️ Play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window

‎ 
### 🪄 What does [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) bring to the table?
- Invite friends to your world
- Chat with your friends
- Chat in groups
- Various Capes, Emotes, and Cosmetics
- Switch accounts in-game
- Edit, share, and view Screenshots in-game
- Discord status integration
- Various other tweaks

‎ 
### Included OptiFine mods:
- Animatica
- CIT Resewn
- Continuity
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Sound Features
- Entity Texture Features
- FabricSkyboxes
- FabricSkyboxes Interop
- MoreMcmeta
- MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures
- OptiGUI
- Polytone

‎ 
> 🪶 For a lighter modpack with a **smaller set of utility mods**, check [Client Necessities](https://modrinth.com/modpack/client-necessities)
